author: gb9t
content:
Iter Phase C continues — 2 more high-impact Tier-3s (KVM coalesced-MMIO + iommufd device-bind):

- virt/kvm/coalesced-mmio.md: covers virt/kvm/coalesced_mmio.c (~190 lines) — per-VM coalesced-MMIO ring batching MMIO writes without per-write vmexit (used by qemu cirrus VGA framebuffer + virtio-mmio doorbells + legacy SVGA): per-VM 4KB ring page mmap'd on vCPU-fd at KVM_COALESCED_MMIO_PAGE_OFFSET, header (first/last) + entry array (~127 entries × 32 bytes each: phys_addr + len + data[8] + pio + padding), KVM_REGISTER_COALESCED_MMIO ioctl installs CoalescedMmioDev pseudo-device on KVM IO bus (PIO_BUS or MMIO_BUS), per-write callback appends to ring tail under per-VM ring_lock OR returns 1 on full → fall through to userspace KVM_EXIT_MMIO, userspace consumer drains entries [first, last) advancing first after each. 10 REQ / 6 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (dev-UAF + ring-idx-OOB + entry-data-size + producer-serialized) / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus producer→consumer round-trip.
- drivers/iommu/iommufd-device.md: covers iommufd/device.c (~1700 lines) — per-device iommufd binding for VFIO + VDPA backends: iommufd_device_bind validates exclusive ownership via atomic-CAS on dev->iommufd_dev (-EBUSY on cross-ictx contention) + allocates per-device idev object, iommufd_device_attach binds idev to HWPT via iommu_attach_group + adds to hwpt.attached_devs RCU-list, iommufd_device_replace atomic HW-side swap via iommu_replace_group_handle (Intel PASID-table-entry replace / ARM SMMUV3 STE replace) for live-migration handoff, per-PASID attach via iommufd_device_iommufd_set_pasid for VDEVICE companion, IOMMU_GET_HW_INFO per-vendor capability blob (Intel CAP+ECAP / SMMUV3 IDR / AMD), per-device reserved-region enumeration for IOAS_MAP refusal of MSI-X window. 10 REQ / 8 AC / Layer-1 Kani SAFETY (idev-UAF + exclusive-ownership + attach-atomicity + pasid-uniqueness) / Layer-3 invariants / Layer-4 Verus bind→attach→IOAS_MAP→DMA round-trip.

Total state: 282 .design docs, 100 Tier-2 + 48 Tier-3s. Foundation Tier-3 set (48): + kvm-coalesced-mmio + iommufd-device.

Knowledge pages: design-virt-kvm-coalesced-mmio, design-drivers-iommu-iommufd-device.

Next iter plan: virt/kvm/x86-cpuid.md (CPUID virtualization tables + KVM_GET_SUPPORTED_CPUID for per-guest feature mask) + drivers/iommu/intel-dmar.md (DMAR ACPI table parsing + per-IOMMU-unit discovery).
